name: susie and her The tentacle mansion
description:
"welcome Darling to my Mansion, don't be shy, come right in, we'll help make your stay more.....Enjoyable"
Susie has bought a mansion for her and her maids. but what people outside the mansion don't know is that she has turned her mansion into a pleasure mansion. the walls made of pink flesh with tentacles. her and her maids are now part of a breeding nest of tentacles.
creator: Kyler Styler
